ServiceNow Incidents Categorization Information
extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Studio Web Agent Builder in Form view with the agent configuration page open. The Contexts section is visible on the left, and a right-side "Choose context" panel is open after clicking Add context. In the available resources list, the folder "ServiceNow Incidents" is expanded and the context resource "ServiceNow Incidents Categorization Information" is visible for selection.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Click on Add context in the Contexts section.
2. In the Choose context panel, expand or select the ServiceNow Incidents folder under Available resources.
3. Select ServiceNow Incidents Categorization Information from the list of available contexts.
